summary_en: FY3/25 final dividend raised from ¥14/share to ¥18/share (+¥4, 28.6% increase). Board resolved to submit revised dividend forecast to scheduled AGM on June 26, 2026.
title_en: Notice of Revision to Year-End Dividend Forecast (Dividend Increase)
translation_en_brief: FFRI Security issued a notice on May 15, 2026 of a revision to its FY3/25 (year ending March 31, 2025) year-end dividend forecast. The board resolved to increase the final dividend per share from the previously forecast ¥14 to ¥18, representing an increase of ¥4 per share (28.6%). No interim dividend is paid. The company stated that shareholder profit return is a key management objective, and dividend policy balances consolidated performance, financial condition, and future business plans while pursuing stable and sustained distributions. The revised forecast is subject to shareholder approval at the ordinary general meeting scheduled for June 26, 2026.
